Title: The Croods
Writer: Kirk DeMicco, Chris Sanders, John Cleese
Actors: Nicolas Cage, Ryan Reynolds, Emma Stone
Plot: "The Croods" are an eccentric family of cavemen, who survive the harsh terrain by living accordingly to a strict set of rules. But when their home is destroyed in the wake of an impending disaster known as "The End", they are forced to leave their home of shelter and security, and into the wilderness of the unknown to find a new home.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 5 wins & 46 nominations total
